purpose: PreviewView is the React component that powers the Live Preview tab. It renders an Electron <webview> embedding a user's running web app (typically a localhost dev server) with a chrome-style toolbar (back/forward/refresh/stop, URL input, dev-server detect button). After each page load it injects two scripts: the inline-edit overlay (imported as raw text via Vite ?raw at build time so it survives the bundled Electron dist) and an inline BRIDGE_SCRIPT that listens for window.postMessage 'synapse-edit' events and re-emits them as console.log lines prefixed with '__SYNAPSE_EDIT__'. The host listens to webview console-message events, parses the prefixed JSON, and writes edits back to source via window.electronAPI.previewUpdateText(projectPath, label, newText, routePath). It manages canGoBack/Forward, dev-server detection, project association per-dashboard via getDashboardProject/saveDashboardProject, edit-status toasts auto-clearing after 3s, and a no-project warning banner when editing is disabled.
gotchas: Overlay script MUST be imported via Vite ?raw and inlined at build time. The previous fetch-based approach broke in the bundled Electron app because relative URLs resolved to nonexistent paths in dist/.
Electron <webview> tag requires webPreferences.webviewTag=true at BrowserWindow creation; nodeintegration must stay OFF for security.

Communication from webview to host goes through console-message events (not postMessage directly) — the bridge re-emits postMessage events as prefixed console.log lines because webviews are isolated processes.
did-stop-loading is the definitive 'all done' signal; did-start-loading can fire multiple times (redirects, sub-frames). Don't rely on did-start-loading alone.
errorCode -3 in did-fail-load means 'cancelled navigation' (user clicked Stop) — must be ignored to avoid spurious error states.
normalizePreviewLabel strips wrapping {}, (), "", '', `` because labels in inject-overlay can be wrapped in JSX expression brackets or string quotes.
Edits dropped silently if no projectPath is set for the dashboard — surfaces an error toast prompting user to click 'Set Project'.
After each successful edit, the label map MUST be refreshed via previewGetLabelMap so subsequent edits resolve to correct line numbers.
forceUpdate(n => n + 1) hack is used after saveDashboardProject because dashboardProjects is read from a non-reactive utility (localStorage), not state.
patterns: Inline overlay/bridge injection via wv.executeJavaScript after did-finish-load; overlayInjectedRef gates duplicate injection per-page.
Cross-isolation message passing: window.postMessage in webview -> console.log with __SYNAPSE_EDIT__ prefix -> host console-message listener parses JSON.
URL normalization heuristic: localhost/IP -> http://, anything else -> https://.
Toolbar shared between empty-state and loaded-state via toolbar JSX variable.
conventions: All preview-* CSS classes scoped under .preview-view in preview-view.css.
AppContext actions: PREVIEW_SET_URL, PREVIEW_SET_LOADING, PREVIEW_SET_ERROR, PREVIEW_ADD_EDIT, PREVIEW_SET_LABEL_MAP.

related: electron/services/InstrumentService.js (creates the data-synapse-label attributes the overlay reads)
